results.question: roster changes between 2024 and 2025 for the New York Mets players on 2025 but not 2024
results.sql: SELECT r25.person__full_name, r25.position__name, r25.jersey_number FROM dw.rosters r25 JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = r25.parent_team_id WHERE t.name = 'New York Mets' AND r25.season = 2025 AND r25.status__code = 'A' AND r25.person__id NOT IN (SELECT r24.person__id FROM dw.rosters r24 JOIN dw.teams t2 ON t2.id = r24.parent_team_id WHERE t2.name = 'New York Mets' AND r24.season = 2024) ORDER BY r25.position__type, r25.person__full_name;

results.question: roster changes between 2025 and 2026 for the New York Mets players on 2026 but not 2025
results.sql:
SELECT TOP (100) r26.person__full_name, r26.position__name, r26.jersey_number
FROM dw.rosters r26
JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = r26.parent_team_id
WHERE t.name = 'New York Mets'
AND r26.season = 2026
AND r26.status__code = 'A'
AND r26.person__id NOT IN (
    SELECT r25.person__id
    FROM dw.rosters r25
    JOIN dw.teams t2 ON t2.id = r25.parent_team_id
    WHERE t2.name = 'New York Mets'
        AND r25.season = 2025
)
ORDER BY r26.position__type, r26.person__full_name

results.question: players on the 10-day,15-day or 60-Day injured list on the San Francisco Giants in 2024-2026
results.sql:
SELECT TOP (100) r.person__full_name,
       t.name AS team_name,
       r.position__name,
       r.status__description,
       r.season
  FROM dw.rosters r
  JOIN dw.teams t ON t.id = r.parent_team_id
  WHERE t.name = 'San Francisco Giants'
    AND r.season between 2024 and 2026
    and r.status__description in ('Injured 10-Day', 'Injured 15-Day', 'Injured 60-Day')
  ORDER BY r.season desc, r.status__description, r.person__full_name
